args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

This document provides a ledger-style record of all routing-related files examined during the Hono routing system analysis. Each file is documented with its purpose, notable names, and a simple note.

---

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main entry point for the Hono framework; instantiates SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as default.
- Names noticed: `Hono`, `HonoBase`, `HonoOptions`, `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `BlankEnv`, `BlankSchema`, `Env`, `Schema`.
- Simple note: The constructor defaults to SmartRouter when no router is explicitly passed in options.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base class providing core Hono functionality including error handling, middleware composition, and router integration.
- Names noticed: `ErrorHandler`, `errorHandler`, `onError`, `compose`, `Context`, `Route`, `BaseRouter`, `app`, `router`, `middleware`, `handleRequest`, `fetchHandler`.
- Simple note: Handles routing execution, error catching, and middleware chains through composition.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file that re-exports PatternRouter class for pattern-based routing.
- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`.
- Simple note: Single-line export statement directing to router implementation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements pattern-based routing using regular expressions for matching paths.
- Names noticed: `Route`, `emptyParams`, `PatternRouter`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `routeMethod`, `match`, `handler`, `parts`, `RegExp`.
- Simple note: Converts path patterns into regex and stores as route array for matching.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file that re-exports LinearRouter class for linear traversal routing.
- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`.
- Simple note: Single-line export statement directing to router implementation.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements linear router using array traversal with support for wildcards and labeled parameters.
- Names noticed: `RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices`, `emptyParams`, `LinearRouter`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `splitPathRe`, `splitByStarRe`, `ROUTES_LOOP`, `routeMethod`, `routePath`, `handler`, `hasStar`, `hasLabel`, `pos`, `index`, `params`.
- Simple note: Processes routes sequentially; uses loops with early continue for mismatches.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file that re-exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter classes.
- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`.
- Simple note: Exports primary RegExpRouter and performance-optimized Prepared variant.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Main RegExp-based router implementation with middleware support and regex pattern matching.
- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Router`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `match`, `emptyParam`, `PATH_ERROR`, `wildcardRegExpCache`, `buildWildcardRegExp`, `buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes`, `findMiddleware`, `HandlerWithMetadata`, `nullMatcher`, `RegExpRouter`, `buildAllMatchers`, `buildMatcher`.
- Simple note: Builds matcher at runtime; caches wildcards and delegates to match helper.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines matcher type and match function for regex-based routing matching.
- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Result`, `Router`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `emptyParam`, `match`.
- Simple note: Constructs match function that caches and uses regex/static map for lookup.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Provides pre-built RegExpRouter for scenarios requiring upfront path knowledge.
- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Result`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `HandlerData`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `StaticMap`, `RelocateMap`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`.
- Simple note: Pre-creates matcher during initialization for faster subsequent adds and matches.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Trie node class for building regex patterns from path tokens.
- Names noticed: `PATH_ERROR`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Context`, `regExpMetaChars`, `compareKey`, `ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `LABEL_REG_EXP_EXP_STR`, `TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `Node`, `insert`, `buildRegExpStr`, `varIndex`, `children`, `tokens`, `regexpStr`.
- Simple note: Recursively builds regex string from path tokens during insertion.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie data structure that organizes path tokens for regex generation.
- Names noticed: `Context`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Node`, `ReplacementMap`, `Trie`, `pathErrorCheckOnly`, `paramAssoc`, `groups`, `tokens`, `regexp`, `captureIndex`, `indexReplacementMap`, `paramReplacementMap`.
- Simple note: Uses groups to replace parameter patterns and delegates to Node for regex building.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file that re-exports SmartRouter class for multi-router orchestration.
- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`.
- Simple note: Single-line export statement directing to router implementation.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Orchestrates multiple routers; tries each sequentially and delegates to best match.
- Names noticed: `Result`, `Router`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `SmartRouter`, `activeRouter`, `routers`, `routes`, `match`, `add`.
- Simple note: Iterates through router array; commits to first successful match.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file that re-exports TrieRouter class.
- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`.
- Simple note: Single-line export statement directing to router implementation.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements trie-based routing for efficient path matching.
- Names noticed: `Result`, `Router`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `Node`, `TrieRouter`, `node`, `insert`, `search`, `results`.
- Simple note: Delegates to Node class for path insertion and traversal during search.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Advanced trie node with pattern matching for complex routing scenarios.
- Names noticed: `Params`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `Pattern`, `getPattern`, `splitPath`, `splitRoutingPath`, `HandlerSet`, `HandlerParamsSet`, `emptyParams`, `hasChildren`, `Node`, `children`, `patterns`, `order`, `params`, `method`, `handler`, `insert`, `search`, `pushHandlerSets`.
- Simple note: Maintains method handlers and pattern lists; performs pattern matching during search.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite that runs common routing tests across all router implementations.
- Names noticed: `RunnerTestSuite`, `ParamIndexMap`, `Params`, `Router`, `runTest`, `skip`, `newRouter`, `task`, `suite`, `skipTask`, `name`, `isSkip`, `beforeEach`, `afterEach`, `match`, `router`.
- Simple note: Provides test scaffolding with skip capability for known limitations.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter covering duplicate params and trailing slash handling.
- Names noticed: `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `PatternRouter`, `duplicate param name`, `Duplicate param name`, `self`, `Trailing slash`, `Trailing slash > GET /book/`.
- Simple note: Runs common tests with specific skips for PatternRouter limitations.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter including multi-match and trailing slash scenarios.
- Names noticed: `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `LinearRouter`, `Multi match`, 'params' per a handler, `Trailing slash`, `Skip part`, `GET /products/list`.
- Simple note: Runs common tests with skips for unsupported path patterns.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter covering ambiguous paths and unsupported patterns.
- Names noticed: `ParamStash`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `runTest`, `RegExpRouter`, `Return value type`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `Ambiguous`, `Multiple handlers`, `parent`, `child`, `static and dynamic`, `Capture Group`, `Complex capturing group`.
- Simple note: Comprehensive coverage including error cases for ambiguous patterns.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests verifying SmartRouter delegates correctly to inner routers.
- Names noticed: `runTest`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `SmartRouter`, `newRouter`.
- Simple note: Uses default SmartRouter composed with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Basic unit tests for TrieRouter via common test suite.
- Names noticed: `runTest`, `TrieRouter`.
- Simple note: Runs all common tests against TrieRouter.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Comprehensive unit tests for TrieRouter node including pattern matching.
- Names noticed: `Params`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `Pattern`, `Node`, `pushHandlerSets`, `insert`, `search`, `Blog`, `failed`, `HandlerSet`, `handlerSets`, `sort`, `score`, `matcher`, `RegExp`.
- Simple note: Contains detailed pattern matching tests with complex regex scenarios.

---

## Cross-File Checklist

### pattern-router

- Exact file paths:
  - `src/router/pattern-router/index.ts`
  - `src/router/pattern-router/router.ts`
  - `src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts`
- Key characteristics: Regular expression-based pattern matching, converts path segments to regex, supports wildcard at end, throws UnsupportedPathError for duplicate params.

### linear-router

- Exact file paths:
  - `src/router/linear-router/index.ts`
  - `src/router/linear-router/router.ts`
  - `src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts`
- Key characteristics: Array-based linear traversal, supports trailing wildcard with label support, processes routes sequentially with early exit on mismatch.

### reg-exp-router

- Exact file paths:
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts`
  - `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts`
- Key characteristics: Two-phase build-time preparation, uses trie to generate complex regex, caches wildcards, supports middleware, has Prepared variant for pre-built performance.

### smart-router

- Exact file paths:
  - `src/router/smart-router/index.ts`
  - `src/router/smart-router/router.ts`
  - `src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts`
- Key characteristics: Router aggregator that tries multiple routers sequentially, commits to first match, used by default in Hono constructor.

### trie-router

- Exact file paths:
  - `src/router/trie-router/index.ts`
  - `src/router/trie-router/router.ts`
  - `src/router/trie-router/node.ts`
  - `src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts`
  - `src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts`
- Key characteristics: Tree-based structure with node-based matching, supports labeled parameters with regex patterns, delegates search and insert to Node class.

---

## Verification Status

- Files read: 24
- Directory created: `bench-artifacts/`
- Output file created: `bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md`
- File size check: Document generated with all 24 file sections and cross-file checklist
- Source code modified: No modifications made to any source files
- Only file created in this task: `bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md`

---
